# ✨ Feature Request

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

## 🧅 O.N.I.O.N Layer Integration

<!-- Which layers would this feature involve? -->

- [ ] L1 - Entry/Trigger (GitHub Actions, triggers)
- [ ] L2 - Build (Build process, artifacts)
- [ ] L3 - Test (Tests, quality gates)
- [ ] L4 - Policy (Policy decisions, compliance)
- [ ] L5 - Control (Approval gates)
- [ ] L6 - Deploy (Deployment, runtime)
- [ ] L7 - Runtime (Health checks, verification)
- [ ] L8 - Audit (Logging, audit trails)
- [ ] L9 - Monitor (Monitoring, alerts)

## 🛡️ Responsible AI Considerations

<!-- How does this feature align with Responsible AI principles? -->

### Affected Principles

- [ ] **Fairness** - Reduces bias or improves fairness
- [ ] **Reliability & Safety** - Improves system reliability or safety
- [ ] **Privacy & Security** - Enhances privacy or security
- [ ] **Inclusiveness** - Improves accessibility or inclusiveness
- [ ] **Transparency** - Increases explainability or transparency
- [ ] **Accountability** - Improves audit trails or accountability

### Child Safety Impact

<!-- Does this feature affect child safety? -->

- [ ] Improves child safety protections
- [ ] Neutral - no child safety impact
- [ ] Requires careful safety review
- [ ] Includes parent/guardian controls

### Explainability

<!-- Will this feature's behavior be explainable to users? -->

- [ ] Yes, feature includes clear explanations
- [ ] Partially, some aspects need documentation
- [ ] No, requires additional work for explainability
